stopConditions.description: stop when the rerun verdict passes every acceptance gate
stop when the iteration or cost budget is reached

iterations.hypothesis: a single proposal-then-rerun passes every gate, equal to a single-shot evolve

boundary: descriptive read-only audit of a bounded multi-iteration evolve campaign; iterations are manual-review unless within the milestone 22 bounded auto-apply budget; no auto-merge; not quality or correctness guarantee
